reviews.author: Thashnee Govender
reviews.text: Rohan is so professional, reliable and knowledgable. My HVAC was fixed on the same day as the call out.

reviews.author: Reshaun Jones
reviews.text: By far the best HVAC company I’ve ever worked with. They took the time to truly help me with my system when other companies turned me down. I highly recommend.

reviews.author: Claire H
reviews.text: If I could give 6 stars, I definitely would. Rohan has helped me out with multiple HVAC and plumbing issues for the last 7 years. He is so great and easy to work with - always responsive, gets the job done quickly and is so helpful in explaining how to do things / prevent future issues. Highly highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Regina Donovan
reviews.text: Absolutely phenomenal service! We really appreciated Rohan’s attention to detail, detailed and transparent assessment, honest feedback and effort to provide best advice. He went above and beyond in diagnosing our heating issues, was thorough, took photos, and explained everything. Reasonable prices too!! Its a wonderful thing to find a company you know you can trust. We will be using HVAC Guyz for all of our HVAC needs going forward.

reviews.author: WSC
reviews.text: quick service! got our AC back online within hours of my call. I will definitely use them again.

notes: Reviews pulled from Places API place_id ChIJ8cpWfjQF9YgRPHbr1ol2SWs (4.8/38). 0 new Google reviews added this cycle. Yelp has 63 reviews + 18 photos still pending Bruce scrape.
